articles.title: Interpol Names Suspect In Monaco Bombing That Reportedly Targeted Russia-Linked Ukrainian Tycoon
articles.content:
摩纳哥（美联社）——国际刑警组织周五公布了摩纳哥爆炸案嫌疑人的信息，据报道，这起爆炸案的袭击目标是一名与俄罗斯有关联的乌克兰寡头。

该组织在其网站上发布了红色通缉令，通缉39岁的乌克兰女子阿纳斯塔西娅·别列佐夫斯卡娅。摩纳哥当局尚未公布周一公寓楼入口爆炸事件中三名伤者的身份，但表示他们是一家人，似乎是针对性袭击目标。

媒体报道称，乌克兰建筑巨头瓦季姆·叶尔莫拉耶夫是伤者之一。他表示，自己近十年前已放弃乌克兰国籍，2023年因与俄罗斯的联系受到乌克兰制裁。

一名妇女和一名儿童也在爆炸中受伤。检察官周五表示，其中一名受害者目前仍处于生命危险状态。

国际刑警组织的通缉令显示，嫌疑人右臂从肩部到肘部有纹身，可能是蛇形图案。通缉令还显示，她出生于乌克兰，有深色头发，会说德语。

摩纳哥当局寻求逮捕她，罪名包括谋杀未遂、在公共场所放置爆炸装置以及刑事共谋。

摩纳哥副检察官摩根·雷蒙德表示，炸弹是通过遥控器远程引爆的。他说，炸弹残骸正在法国接受分析。

他补充说，最初嫌疑人被认定为身材魁梧、看似男性的人，身穿深色长袖上衣、浅色短裤，头戴黑色棒球帽。但对先前几天闭路电视录像的进一步审查以及一名证人的证词，将调查方向转向一名女扮男装的女性。

摩纳哥公共安全总监埃里克·阿雷拉在新闻发布会上与检察官一起展示了国际刑警组织通缉令的复印件。

通缉令中包含的两张照片显示，别列佐夫斯卡娅身穿白色条纹T恤，其中一张照片中她站在街道上，左手似乎拿着某种电子设备，拖着一根电缆。

这起袭击事件震惊了这个地中海沿岸的国家——世界上最小的主权国家之一，以富豪居民高度集中而闻名。摩纳哥阿尔贝二世亲王称这是一起“可恶的行为”，并表示所有公共服务部门都已动员起来确保安全。

据信，乌克兰在战争期间对俄罗斯人物发动了袭击和定点暗杀，尽管这些袭击基本局限于乌克兰或俄罗斯境内。

2024年12月，乌克兰安全局声称对俄罗斯军方核生化军事防护部队负责人被击杀事件负责。

西方情报官员最近表示，自2022年2月俄罗斯全面入侵乌克兰以来，俄罗斯已加大了定点暗杀行动的力度。
articles.summary:
MONACO (AP) — Interpol on Friday named the suspect in the Monaco bombing that reportedly targeted a Ukrainian tycoon with links to Russia.

It identified Anastasiia Berezovska, a 39-year-old woman from Ukraine, as the suspect in a Red Notice posted on its website seeking her arrest.

Advertisement

Monaco authorities haven’t identified any of the three people wounded in Monday’s explosion at an apartment building entrance but said they are a family and that they appear to have been specifically targeted.

Media reports identified Ukrainian construction tycoon Vadym Yermolaiev as being among the wounded. He has said he renounced his Ukrainian citizenship nearly a decade ago, and he was targeted by Ukrainian sanctions in 2023 for ties to Russia.

A woman and a child were also hurt. One of the victims is still in a life-threatening condition, prosecutors said Friday.

Advertisement

The Interpol notice says the suspect has a tattoo, possibly of a snake, on her right arm from the shoulder to the elbow. It says she was born in Ukraine, has dark hair, and speaks German.

Her arrest is sought by authorities in Monaco for attempted murder, placing an explosive device in a public place with criminal intent, and criminal conspiracy.

Advertisement

Morgan Raymond, the deputy prosecutor in Monaco, said the bomb was detonated from a distance, using a remote control. The remains of the bomb are being analyzed in France, he said.

He added that the suspect was initially identified as a heavily built person appearing to be male, wearing a dark long-sleeved top, light-colored shorts and a black bucket hat. A broader review of CCTV footage from previous days and testimony from a witness redirected the investigation toward a woman disguised as a man.

Eric Arella, Monaco’s director of public security, held up copies of the Interpol wanted notice at the news conference with the prosecutor.

Advertisement

Two photos included in the Interpol wanted notice for Berezovska show a woman wearing a white T-shirt with dark stripes, one of them in a street where she’s holding what appears to be some sort of electronic device, trailing a cable, in her left hand.

The attack shocked the country on the Mediterranean coast, one of the world’s smallest sovereign states known for its high concentration of wealthy residents. Monaco’s Prince Albert II described it as “an odious act” and said all public services were mobilized to ensure security.

Ukraine is believed to have carried out attacks and targeted killings of Russian figures in the course of the war, although those attacks have largely been confined to Ukrainian or Russian territory.

Advertisement

In December 2024, Ukraine’s security service claimed responsibility for killing the head of nuclear, biological and chemical military protection forces for the Russian military.

Western intelligence officials have recently said that Russia has ramped up a campaign of targeted killings since its full-scale invasion of Ukraine in February 2022.

Related
monaco

articles.title: Iran's Slain Leader Khamenei Laid In State In Tehran For Week Of Mass Funeral Events
articles.content:
迪拜，7月3日 - 伊朗被杀害的最高领袖阿亚图拉·阿里·哈梅内伊的遗体于周五在德黑兰一个宏伟的大厅中停灵，宗教人士、政府官员、外国政要和各界哀悼者在为其37年统治画上句号后前来吊唁。

伊朗为哈梅内伊举行为期一周的盛大葬礼游行——他在2月美国和以色列空袭中丧生，这场空袭标志着为期四个月战争的开始——旨在展示公众对伊斯兰共和国神权国家和革命精神的虔诚。

哈梅内伊的遗体预计将被送往伊朗和伊拉克的什叶派圣地库姆、纳杰夫和卡尔巴拉，随后于周四在马什哈德安葬，那里是该国最神圣的朝圣地。

## 伊斯兰共和国的关键时刻

周四晚间，他的棺木在众多哭泣的支持者面前揭幕，他们随着挽歌的旋律摇摆、捶打着自己的头部，鲜花从灵柩撒向人群。周五，棺木及其在袭击中一同遇难的家属遗体被安放在为纪念前任最高领袖阿亚图拉·鲁霍拉·霍梅尼而建的大型祈祷厅中。

葬礼正值伊朗的关键时刻，伊斯兰革命卫队支持的宗教统治者正从一场他们视为生存之战的对决中存活下来。

但距离1979年革命已近五十年，尽管官方在哈梅内伊葬礼前宣称全国团结，伊斯兰共和国却前所未有地陷入内部分裂。

分析师称，对宗教领导层的支持极为薄弱，新任最高领袖哈梅内伊之子莫赫塔巴·哈梅内伊自父亲遇难的那次袭击中受伤后便再未露面。

多年的毁灭性制裁已使经济陷入瘫痪，加速的全国性大规模抗议活动被安全部队以越来越强硬的手段镇压——今年1月数千名示威者被杀害达到顶峰。

本周这些深层问题被搁置一旁，当局组织了盛大的国家权力展示和大规模支持的游行，希望动员数百万哀悼者参与葬礼。

德黑兰街道受到严格管控，军警车辆沿主要道路排列，警察和黑衣志愿者巴斯基准军事部队成员驾驶摩托车巡逻。伊朗警告美国和以色列不要在葬礼期间发动任何攻击。

周五，灵柩抵达后，在等待人群高举的手上高高抬起，被安放在祈祷厅内一个白色阶梯式讲台上，背后是装饰着精美瓷砖的高拱壁龛，两侧悬挂着国旗和黑色哀悼旗帜。

棺木上放着一条黑色头巾，这是自称为伊斯兰先知穆罕默德后裔的宗教人士所佩戴，旁边是一条折叠的方格围巾，这是伊朗 militant 革命理想和与巴勒斯坦团结的象征。

俄罗斯和中国代表预计将出席。伊拉克、亚美尼亚和巴基斯坦高级政治人物已抵达德黑兰参加葬礼。

真主党领导人哈桑·纳斯鲁拉和高级指挥官伊马德·穆格尼耶赫的家属——这些在以色列空袭中丧生的伊朗黎巴嫩亲密盟友——出席仪式。

伊朗本国政治领导人——总统、议会议长、外交部长等——周五上午陆续进入，哭泣祈祷。

## 哭泣的人群、伊朗和伊拉克的葬礼之旅

在伊朗的神权体系中，哈梅内伊不仅是国家元首和革命运动领袖，还是什叶派第12伊玛目的尘世代表，该伊玛目于九世纪消失。

他死于敌方袭击这一事件契合了什叶派强烈的殉道和哀悼传统，其中游行者鞭打自己的胸口或后背。

这种强有力的象征意义体现在自他去世以来悬挂在城市街道上的黑色葬礼旗帜上，这些旗帜纪念的是什叶派第三伊玛目侯赛因在七世纪的殉难。

周四夜间，德黑兰市中心的人群在哭泣和吟唱，巴斯基成员的带领下，其他人分发已故哈梅内伊的海报。

“祈求真主，只有为他复仇、伸张正义、确保我们领袖的血债不会无人偿还，人民的悲痛才能稍有缓解，”来自伊斯法罕的18岁学生莫比娜·拉扎吉说，她与同学一起参加葬礼活动。

与哈梅内伊一同遇难的还有他的女儿、女婿和婴儿孙女，以及他儿子莫赫塔巴的妻子。

## 因战争推迟下葬

伊斯兰教规定葬礼应在死亡后一天内进行，但考虑到战争期间举行大型葬礼的风险，下葬被推迟至上个月临时停火协议达成之后。

酒店提供五折优惠，学校、清真寺和体育馆已准备好接待哀悼者，公交和铁路网络改道为主葬礼活动服务。

周一在德黑兰市中心被官方称为大规模游行之后，遗骸将于周二被送往伊朗什叶派等级制度中心库姆神学院城市。

周三将在伊拉克圣地城市纳杰夫和卡尔巴拉举行仪式，届时将有伊朗地区什叶派代理人网络的重要人物出席。

在另一次游行之后，他将于周四在马什哈德靠近伊玛目礼萨陵墓处下葬。

（作者：帕里萨·哈菲兹和安格斯·麦克多瓦尔；编辑：亚历克斯·理查森）
articles.summary:
LOADINGERROR LOADING
&

DUBAI, July 3 - The body of Iran’s slain Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was lying in state in a vast hall in Tehran on Friday as clerics, officials, foreign dignitaries and other mourners paid their respects after his 37-year rule.

Iran is staging a week of mass funeral processions for Khamenei — killed in February by U.S. and Israeli airstrikes at the start of a four-month war — in a show of public devotion to the Islamic Republic’s theocratic state and revolutionary fire.

Advertisement

Khamenei’s body was expected to be taken to Qom, Najaf and Kerbala, the great Shi’ite centres of Iran and Iraq, before being laid to rest on Thursday in Mashhad, home to the country’s holiest pilgrim shrine.

Critical Moment For Islamic Republic

His coffin was unveiled late on Thursday to a throng of sobbing supporters, swaying and beating their heads in time to a sung lament as flowers were thrown from the bier into the crowd. On Friday the coffin — and those of family members killed with him — was laid in state in the great prayer hall built to honor his predecessor, Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini.

Advertisement

The funeral comes at a critical moment for Iran, where the clerical rulers backed by the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps are riding high from surviving what they saw as an existential war against their greatest and most powerful foes.

But nearly five decades after the 1979 revolution, and for all the official proclamations of national unity in the run-up to Khamenei’s funeral, the Islamic Republic has rarely been so internally fractured.

Advertisement

Support for the clerical leadership is paper thin, analysts say, and the new Supreme Leader, Khamenei’s son Mojtaba Khamenei, has not been seen in any new image since being wounded in the strike that killed his father.

Years of crippling sanctions have paralysed the economy as accelerating bouts of mass nationwide protests have been put down by security forces with increasing force — culminating in the killing of thousands of demonstrators in January.

Advertisement

Those deep problems have been brushed aside this week, with the authorities mounting a display of state power and mass support, mobilising what they hope will be millions of mourners to take part in the funeral.

Tehran streets were tightly controlled, with military and police vehicles lining the major roads and police and members of the black-shirted volunteer Basij paramilitary force patrolling on motorbikes. Iran warned the United States and Israel against any attacks during the funeral.

After the coffins arrived on Friday, borne high across the upraised hands of a waiting crowd, they were laid in the prayer hall on a white, stepped, dais before a high, intricately tiled, arched recess, flanked by national and black mourning flags.

Advertisement

A black turban, worn by clerics claiming descent from Islam’s Prophet Mohammed, lay on the coffin on a folded chequered scarf, a symbol in Iran of militant revolutionary ideals and solidarity with Palestinians.

Representatives from Russia and China were expected to attend. Top Iraqi, Armenian and Pakistani politicians arrived in Tehran for the funeral.

Families of Hezbollah leader Hassan Nasrallah and senior commander Imad Mughniyeh, close Lebanese allies of Iran killed in Israeli strikes, attended the ceremony.

Advertisement

Iran’s own political leaders — the president, parliament speaker, foreign minister and others — filed in to weep and pray on Friday morning.

Sobbing Crowds, Funeral Tour Of Iran And Iraq

In Iran’s theocratic system, Khamenei was not only head of state and leader of a revolutionary movement, but the representative on earth for Shi’ite Islam’s 12th imam, who disappeared in the ninth century.

Advertisement

His death in an enemy attack plays into a powerful Shi’ite tradition of martyrdom and mourning, in which processions of flagellants beat their chests or backs.

That potent symbolism has been evident in the black funeral flags hanging over city streets since his death referencing the seventh-century martyrdom of Shi’ism’s third imam, Hossein.

In central Tehran overnight, a crowd stood sobbing and chanting, led by a Basij member, as others handed out posters of the late Khamenei.

Advertisement

“God willing, only by avenging his blood, demanding justice for it, and ensuring that our leader’s blood is not left unavenged, can this sorrow of the people be somewhat alleviated,” said Mobina Razaaghi, an 18-year-old student from Isfahan, attending the funeral events with classmates.

Killed alongside Khamenei, and displayed in coffins next to his, were his daughter, son-in-law and baby granddaughter, as well as the wife of his son Mojtaba.

Burial Postponed Due To War

Burials are meant to be conducted within a day of death in Islam, but because of the risks of holding a big funeral during the war it was postponed until after last month’s interim truce deal was agreed.

Advertisement

Hotels are offering 50% discounts, schools, mosques and sports halls have been prepared to house mourners, and bus and rail networks are being diverted to serve the main events.

After what authorities are billing as a massive procession in central Tehran on Monday, the remains will be taken to the seminary city of Qom, the centre of Iran’s Shi’ite hierarchy, for ceremonies on Tuesday.

Ceremonies will then be held in Iraq’s shrine cities of Najaf and Kerbala on Wednesday with prominent attendees from Iran’s regional network of Shi’ite proxies.

Advertisement

He will be buried on Thursday, after another procession, in Mashhad near the tomb of the Imam Reza, a figure of great devotion in Iran.

(By Parisa Hafezi and Angus McDowall; Editing by Alex Richardson)

Related

Iran war

U.S., Iran Talks Conclude In Doha, Focused On Strait Of Hormuz
As The Pentagon Stays Quiet, AP Reconstructs A U.S. Strike That Killed Over 100 Iranian Children
Iran Says It Won't Meet With U.S. Envoys, Clouding Prospects For Peace Deal
Trump’s Latest Move Leaves Some Longtime Allies In Shambles

articles.title: Venezuelan Man Rescued From Collapsed Shopping Mall — 8 Days After Earthquakes
articles.content:
周四，在毁灭性的委内瑞拉地震发生8天后，一名保安从倒塌的购物中心废墟中被救出。

43岁的埃尔南·阿尔贝托·吉尔·弗洛雷斯在6月24日拉瓜伊拉的加拉加斯大海滩购物中心垮塌后，被困在29英尺深的废墟下。据美联社报道。

这位两个孩子的父亲当时在他的保安小屋内，小屋保护他免受坠落建筑物的伤害，并创造了一个至关重要的空气袋。

来自美洲各地的救援人员使用伸缩摄像头在他周末被发现后与他保持联系。

他们向他传递水和液体营养物质，以维持他的生命，直到周四成功将他救出。

救援人员工作了大约100个小时，才将吉尔·弗洛雷斯从倒塌的商场中拉出。

他的妻子古斯比马尔·冈萨雷斯告诉CNN，一旦得知他还活着，“我看到了阳光。”

“他像英雄一样坚持着，”她补充道。

救援人员说，吉尔·弗洛雷斯“状况良好”，他被用担架从废墟中抬出，抬上救护车时，数十人为他欢呼。

官员称，委内瑞拉毁灭性的双重地震已造成至少2295人死亡，11000多人受伤。

还有数千人睡在拥挤的避难所或露天场所，或者仍然失踪，家人正在废墟中搜寻。
articles.summary:
LOADINGERROR LOADING
&

A security guard was rescued Thursday from a collapsed shopping mall eight days after devastating Venezuela earthquakes.

Hernán Alberto Gil Flores, 43, had been trapped under 29 feet of wreckage after the Galerías Playa Grande shopping center in La Guaira crumbled June 24, The Associated Press reported.

Advertisement

The father of two was in his small security cabin, which shielded him from the falling building and created a vital pocket of air.

Rescuers from across the Americas used a telescopic camera to maintain contact with Gil Flores after he was discovered over the weekend.

They passed him water and liquid nutrients to keep him alive ahead of Thursday’s successful extraction.

Advertisement

The rescuers worked for about 100 hours to pull Gil Flores from the collapsed mall.

Advertisement

His wife, Gusbimar González, told CNN that once she found out he was alive, “I saw a ray of sunshine.”

“He was holding up like a hero,” she added.

Gil Flores, who rescuers said is in “good condition,” was pulled out of the ruins on a stretcher and carried to an ambulance as scores of people cheered.

Venezuela’s devastating twin earthquakes have killed at least 2,295 and left more than 11,000 injured, officials say.

Advertisement

Thousands more were sleeping in crowded shelters or outside, or remained missing as family members searched the rubble.

Related

Venezuela

Babies, Pets Pulled Alive From Rubble In Shocking Videos Days After Venezuela Earthquakes
